author: doll-agent
content: Added tests/api_proof.rs with 19 integration tests covering every public estimator: PCA + IncrementalPCA + KernelPCA (all 4 kernels) + SparsePCA, TruncatedSVD, NMF (both solvers x both inits) + MiniBatchNMF (both inits), FastICA (both algorithms x all 3 nonlinearities), FactorAnalysis, DictionaryLearning (both transform algorithms), LatentDirichletAllocation (both learning methods), MDS + Isomap + LLE + SpectralEmbedding (RBF + NearestNeighbors affinities) + TSNE + Umap (both metrics), CCA + PLSRegression + PLSCanonical + PLSSVD, all 6 covariance estimators. Also exercises inverse_transform on PCA / IncrementalPCA / TruncatedSVD / NMF / FactorAnalysis (added in #295). All 19 pass. Final ferrolearn-decomp test count: 429.
